name: 社交媒体图
description: 小红书、Instagram、抖音等社媒平台风格图片

defaults.composition: lifestyle flat lay or scene, social media aspect, engaging

prohibitions: 不要添加水印、假 logo。保持自然生活感，可以包含日常道具和植物。顶部中央 200×100 区域留空。

prompt_template.subject: social media style shot, {product_description}
prompt_template.quality: social media content, high quality lifestyle

overrides.background: warm cream desk with coffee cup and magazine
overrides.lighting: bright warm natural light from window
overrides.composition: aesthetic flat lay, top-down 90°, balanced composition

overrides.lighting: soft window light with subtle warm tint
overrides.composition: lifestyle scene, model holding product, candid feel
dynamic angle, slightly from below, energetic composition
